'''panguthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidariologist|cnidariologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidariologist|cnidariologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| panguthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pængithith|pængithith]] || [[word:pængithij|pængithij]] || [[word:pængithish|pængithish]] || [[word:pængithi|pængithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangunguthuth|pangunguthuth]] || [[word:pangunguthuj|pangunguthuj]] || [[word:pangunguthush|pangunguthush]] || [[word:pangunguthu|pangunguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:panguthuth|panguthuth]] || [[word:panguthuj|panguthuj]] || [[word:panguthush|panguthush]] || [[word:panguthu|panguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangufthuth|pangufthuth]] || [[word:pangufthuj|pangufthuj]] || [[word:pangufthush|pangufthush]] || [[word:pangufthuf|pangufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:panguthuthu|panguthuthu]] || [[word:panguthuju|panguthuju]] || [[word:panguthushu|panguthushu]] || [[word:panguthuku|panguthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:panguthuth|panguthuth]] || [[word:panguthuj|panguthuj]] || [[word:panguthush|panguthush]] || [[word:panguthu|panguthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:panguthuthul|panguthuthul]] || [[word:panguthujul|panguthujul]] || [[word:panguthushul|panguthushul]] || [[word:panguthukul|panguthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:panguthuthuthu|panguthuthuthu]] || [[word:panguthujuju|panguthujuju]] || [[word:panguthushushu|panguthushushu]] || [[word:panguthuku|panguthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:panguthuthun|panguthuthun]] || [[word:panguthujun|panguthujun]] || [[word:panguthushun|panguthushun]] || [[word:panguthukun|panguthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:panguthuthuoro|panguthuthuoro]] || [[word:panguthujuoro|panguthujuoro]] || [[word:panguthushuoro|panguthushuoro]] || [[word:panguthukuoro|panguthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
